    Index

    A B C D E F G H I M N O P R S T U V X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    D

    damage - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    The value of environmental hazard damage dealt to a character upon entering.
    dealDmg(GameCharacter) - Method in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    Deals damage to a target enemy based on this character's attack power.
    destroyTile(Tile) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Replaces a specific block node with a regular, passable floor layout tile upon breakdown.
    destructible - Variable in class Dungeon_Classes.Tile
    Flag identifying whether this map component can be broken down or collected.
    DestructibleTile - Class in Dungeon_Classes
    Represents a tile within the dungeon layout that can be broken or collected.
    DestructibleTile(int, int, char, int, Item, boolean) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
    Constructs a destructible tile with direct assignments for drops and attributes.
    DestructibleTile(Tile) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
    Constructs a destructible tile copy using attributes from an existing parent Tile instance.
    detectPlayer(Tile[][], PlayableChar) - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
    Calculates whether the player character is within the enemy's detection range using Manhattan distance calculation.
    dialogue - Variable in class Character_Classes.GameCharacter
    The dialogue spoken by the character during world interactions.
    dig(Tile, Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
    Executes wall destruction processing against blocked target map coordinates.
    discardItem(int) - Method in class Character_Classes.PlayableChar
    Discards an item asset out of the active list using an explicit collection index.
    displayDungeonClearScene(Dungeon) - Static method in class Game
    Outputs the dialogue for unlocking Hanamaru's shop after saving Hanamaru
    displayDungeonMenu(Dungeon, int, PlayableChar) - Static method in class Game
    Refreshes display lines tracking operational statistics, mapping metadata indexes, and delegates control to paint structural tiles.
    displayGameMenu(PlayableChar, Dungeon) - Static method in class Game
    Loops choices allowing the character to transition into physical environments, check collected storage structures, or yield activities.
    displayInventory(PlayableChar) - Static method in class Game
    Pauses procedural states to write out tabular listings capturing metadata naming parameters for all held item entities currently tracked inside storage.
    displayMainMenu() - Static method in class Game
    Loops a terminal presentation displaying standard introduction sequences, forwarding triggers to configure game models, evaluate status trackers, or terminate.
    displayMap(PlayableChar) - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.Floor
    Compiles and outputs colorized display strings to print the visual map grid out, handling priority layer overlays for the player character and active enemy status transformations.
    displayShop() - Static method in class Game
     
    displayStats(PlayableChar) - Static method in class Game
     
    displayStatus() - Static method in class Game
    Renders a placeholder block notification layout alerting that attribute inspections are still undergoing engineering developments.
    dropGold(Floor) - Method in class Character_Classes.EnemyChar
    Spawns a gold treasure tile at the enemy's current grid position upon defeat.
    dropTreasure() - Method in class Dungeon_Classes.DestructibleTile
    Randomizes the treasure tile's content state, transforming its layout representation into either a raw item drop ('I') or a gold drop ('g').
    Dungeon - Class in Dungeon_Classes
    Represents a multi-floor dungeon layout within the game world.
    Dungeon(String, int, int, Floor[], NPChar) - Constructor for class Dungeon_Classes.Dungeon
    Constructs a dungeon environment with predefined floors, resetting the current floor tracking index to its baseline starting stage.
    Dungeon_Classes - package Dungeon_Classes
